tagline: Pool Repair and Cleaning. We Got You Covered.

hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves Owner-Level Care
hero.subheadline: Dan personally services every pool — no subcontractors, no shortcuts. With 14+ years of hands-on experience and a Certified Pool Operator license, your pool is in the best hands in Sun City.
checkmarks: Owner-operated — Dan handles every visit personally
Trusted by Sun City families since 2015

services.headline: Complete Pool Care for Sun City Homes
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to complex repairs, we handle everything so you can simply enjoy your pool.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough skimming, vacuuming, brushing, and debris removal — your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every week.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and motors to restore your pool system to peak performance.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Balancing
cards.description: Professional testing and chemical adjustment to keep your water safe, sanitized, and comfortable for your family.

cards.title: Preventive Maintenance
cards.description: Routine inspections and proactive care that catches small issues before they become expensive problems.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning & Service
cards.description: Deep cleaning and maintenance of cartridge, DE, and sand filters to maintain proper water circulation and clarity.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Care
cards.description: Arizona-specific seasonal adjustments to protect your pool from intense heat, monsoon debris, and algae growth.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or email us. Dan will visit your pool, evaluate its condition, and discuss your needs — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Care Plan
steps.description: We'll recommend the right service schedule and address any repairs needed to get your pool in top shape.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Sit back while Dan handles everything. You'll get follow-up communication after every visit so you always know your pool's status.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 2015
about.headline: Meet Dan & Debbie — Your Neighbors in Pool Care
about.description: Clean & Brite Pools is a family-owned business started by Debbie and Dan right here in Sun City. We're not a franchise or a crew of strangers — Dan personally services every pool with the same care he gives his own. With a Certified Pool Operators license and over 14 years of experience, we're dedicated to protecting your investment so you can enjoy priceless peace of mind.

features.title: Every Visit by Dan Personally
features.description: No revolving door of strangers. Dan handles every single service call with true accountability.

features.title: Follow-Up After Every Service
features.description: Transparent communication so you always know exactly what was done and how your pool is doing.

features.title: Affordable Neighbor Rates
features.description: Fair pricing from a local owner who genuinely cares about your pool and your budget.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: We offer straightforward rates with no hidden fees. Contact us for a personalized quote based on your pool's size and needs.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, Dan will return and make it right at no additional charge. We stand behind every visit because your trust is what built this business.

faqs.question: Do you service pools in Sun City West as well?
faqs.answer: Yes! We service pools throughout Sun City, Sun City West, and surrounding areas in the West Valley. Contact us to confirm we cover your neighborhood.

faqs.question: Is Dan the one who actually cleans my pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Clean & Brite is owner-operated, which means Dan personally performs every service visit. You'll never get a random technician you've never met.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced?
faqs.answer: In Arizona's climate, we recommend weekly service to stay ahead of heat-driven chemical changes, debris, and algae. We'll customize a schedule that works for your pool.

faqs.question: What does a typical weekly cleaning include?
faqs.answer: Every visit includes skimming, brushing walls and tile, vacuuming, emptying baskets, checking equipment, and testing and adjusting water chemistry.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Dan holds a Certified Pool Operator (CPO) license and Clean & Brite is an approved business partner with the Sun City Home Owners Association.

testimonials.name: Brian Nash
testimonials.text: They go out of their way to do the job quickly and correctly, and follow up every time to ensure you're happy. I couldn't recommend them more highly.

testimonials.name: Diane Bennett
testimonials.text: I finally found the perfect answer to my pool maintenance problem. They are both professional and thorough, along with being within my price range.

testimonials.name: Terry Hansen
testimonials.text: This is the best pool service we've ever had. They are on top of everything.
